title: SynthID, our imperceptible watermark for AI-generated content, is expanding to more partners.
summary: Google DeepMind has developed SynthID, an imperceptible watermarking technique for AI-generated content. The announcement indicates SynthID is expanding to more partners, expanding adoption of the watermarking system.
